telemetryFile.description: Path to append per-turn telemetry JSONL (empty = no file logging)

profiles.description: Named tool profiles: { profileName: { tools: [...], keywords: [...] } }

toolDescriptionOverrides.description: Override the classifier's description for specific tools. Keys are tool IDs (e.g. 'nodes', 'message'); values are replacement strings. Merged on top of built-in defaults at boot.

skillDescriptionOverrides.description: Override the classifier's description for specific skills. Keys are skill IDs (e.g. 'github', 'research-qa'); values are replacement strings. Merged on top of built-in defaults at boot.

tags.description: Extra tags appended to LiteLLM-style metadata.tags on every classifier request. Useful for per-deployment cost attribution.
